Home/Counties/Santa Rosa County FHA Loans
Santa Rosa County FHA Loans

FHA loans in Santa Rosa County, Florida

FHA loans across Santa Rosa County with as little as 3.5% down. Here's the county's 2026 FHA loan limit, why this growing Panhandle county suits FHA buyers, and how to get pre-approved.

Santa Rosa County Home Loans

FHA loans in Santa Rosa County, Florida

Santa Rosa County, just east of Pensacola, is one of the Panhandle's fastest-growing areas, with family-friendly communities in Pace and Milton and beach access at Navarre and Gulf Breeze. A strong military presence across the region and an affordable, new-construction-rich market make it a natural FHA county — the loan limit covers most homes, and 3.5% down opens the door for families and military households.

Santa Rosa County FHA limit (1-unit)$541,287

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Min credit score580

500–579 with 10% down

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Santa Rosa County

With the 2026 FHA floor of $541,287 and FHA's 3.5% minimum down, you can finance a Santa Rosa County home priced up to roughly $560,000 (your loan covers the price minus your down payment). In Santa Rosa's affordable, growing market, that covers the vast majority of homes, including plenty of new construction. A handful of Florida counties are set higher, so we confirm Santa Rosa County's exact figure with HUD.

Affordable Panhandle growth and military buyers

Pace and Milton offer affordable new-construction homes within the FHA limit, ideal for first-time buyers and families. With several military installations across the Pensacola area, many buyers weigh FHA against VA — our FHA vs. VA guide helps you choose. Beach condos in Navarre and Gulf Breeze require the building to be FHA-approved; see our condo guide.

Communities We Serve

FHA loans across Santa Rosa County

We help FHA buyers throughout Santa Rosa County, including Milton, Pace, Gulf Breeze, and Navarre. Wherever you are in the county, we will explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment, and get you pre-approved fast. Start with our first-time buyer guide or estimate your payment with the FHA calculator.

Down payment help in Santa Rosa County

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Santa Rosa County buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Santa Rosa County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Santa Rosa County for 2026?+
Santa Rosa County is at the 2026 Florida FHA floor of $541,287, which covers most homes in the county. Confirm the exact figure with HUD's official lookup.
Is Santa Rosa County good for FHA buyers?+
Yes — affordable, fast-growing communities like Pace and Milton, with lots of new construction, make it a strong FHA market.
Should I use FHA or VA in Santa Rosa County?+
If you're a qualifying service member or veteran, VA may offer 0% down; otherwise FHA is the go-to low-down-payment option. Our FHA vs. VA guide compares them.
How much down payment do I need in Santa Rosa County?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score, reduced with gift funds and Florida assistance.
Do you serve all of Santa Rosa County?+
Yes — Milton, Pace, Gulf Breeze, Navarre, and every community in the county.
